journal.title_en: International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture

title_cn: Brian D. Josephson 学术网络

affiliations.name_cn: 超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌编辑部
affiliations.name_en: Editorial Office, International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture

abstract_cn: Brian D. Josephson 为剑桥大学教授，1973年诺贝尔物理学奖获得者，也是 Mind–Matter Unification Project 的指导者。本文根据张一方教授提供的资料和 Josephson 教授公开主页，整理其与心物问题、组织复杂性、意识研究、量子理论边界及超常现象相关的学术网络，供本刊读者进入其研究脉络。
abstract_en: Brian D. Josephson, Professor at the University of Cambridge and Nobel Laureate in Physics 1973, is Director of the Mind–Matter Unification Project. This profile summarizes selected public academic resources connected with his work on mind-matter issues, organised complexity, consciousness studies, the limits of quantum theory, and anomalous phenomena.
license: Open Access; copyright retained by authors unless otherwise stated.
citation_cn: 本刊编辑部：《Brian D. Josephson 学术网络》，《超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌》，2026，1(1)，Article 001。
citation_en: Editorial Office. Brian D. Josephson Academic Network. International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture, 2026, 1(1), Article 001.

journal.title_cn: 超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌
journal.title_en: International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture

title_cn: 勇于求索，诗意人生——对真理的追求高于生命
title_en: A Life of Exploration and Poetry — The Pursuit of Truth Is Above Life Itself
abstract_cn: 本文为《超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌》创刊发刊词，阐述本刊创办缘起、求索精神与开放获取方向，强调对真理的持续追求以及跨学科研究的必要性。
abstract_en: This editorial introduces the founding spirit of the journal, its commitment to open access, and its emphasis on sustained inquiry, intellectual courage, and interdisciplinary studies in parapsychology and Chinese traditional culture.
license: Open Access; copyright retained by authors unless otherwise stated.
citation_cn: 张一方：《勇于求索，诗意人生——对真理的追求高于生命》，《超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌》，2026，1(1)，Article 002。
citation_en: Chang Y-F. A Life of Exploration and Poetry — The Pursuit of Truth Is Above Life Itself. International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture, 2026, 1(1), Article 002.

journal.title_cn: 超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌
journal.title_en: International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture

title_cn: 世界超心理学的比较研究和中华超心理学特色
title_en: The Comparative Study of World Parapsychology and Characters of Chinese Parapsychology
abstract_cn: 国内外超心理学研究由来已久，由此探讨了现代中外超心理学研究的某些特点，并比较了中外研究方法和领域的异同。进而具体探索了量子超心理学和地震预测，提出超心理学和人类社会的身心灵三维世界。超心理学作为一种新兴科学必然是普适的，但对每个个体又是不同的。中华超心理学应当发挥自己的优势，取长补短，为弘扬中华传统文化，为发展世界超心理学，做出华人的贡献。
abstract_en: The study of parapsychology has a long history. This paper discusses selected characteristics of modern parapsychology, compares Chinese and foreign research methods and fields, and further explores quantum parapsychology and earthquake prediction. It proposes a three-dimensional body-mind-spirit view of parapsychology and human society, arguing that Chinese parapsychology should develop its own strengths while learning from global research.
license: Open Access; copyright retained by authors unless otherwise stated.
citation_cn: 张一方：《世界超心理学的比较研究和中华超心理学特色》，《超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌》，2026，1(1)，Article 003。
citation_en: Chang Y-F. The Comparative Study of World Parapsychology and Characters of Chinese Parapsychology. International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture, 2026, 1(1), Article 003.

journal.title_cn: 超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌
journal.title_en: International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture

title_cn: 意念力與植物顆粒相互作用的實驗研究
title_en: An Experimental Study on the Influence of the Power of Thought on Plant Granules

affiliations.name_cn: 广西民族大学科技史与科技文化研究院
affiliations.name_en: Institute for History of Science and Scientific Culture, Guangxi Minzu University

abstract_cn: 在严格的物理实验环境下，让摄像系统即时拍摄监控整个实验过程。采用普通人有意念和无意念，功能人无意念和有意念进行对照，通过意念施行者对置于密闭玻璃罩里盛水容器中的水施以意念力，使水面上或水体中的植物颗粒产生位移。本文通过31次远距离对照实验，报告意念力作用的宏观现象。
abstract_en: Under strict physical experimental conditions, a camera system was used to record and monitor the entire experimental process in real time. Control conditions compared ordinary people and individuals with special abilities, with and without mental intent. The subjects applied mental intent to water in a sealed glass enclosure, causing plant particles on or within the water to shift. Through 31 long-distance controlled experiments, the paper reports macroscopic phenomena associated with mental force.
license: Open Access; copyright retained by authors unless otherwise stated.
citation_cn: 孔令宏、容志毅：《意念力與植物顆粒相互作用的實驗研究》，《超心理學和中華傳統文化國際雜誌》，2026，1(1)，Article 004。
citation_en: Kong L-H, Rong Z-Y. An Experimental Study on the Influence of the Power of Thought on Plant Granules. International Journal of Parapsychology and Traditional Chinese Culture, 2026, 1(1), Article 004.
